name: Forest's Calling - THERIAN SCHOOL
description:
*`*~THERE WILL COME A SOLIDER WHO CARRIES A MIGHTY SWORD. HE WILL TEAR YOUR CITY DOWN, OH LEI, OH LAI, OH LORD.~*`*
*`You go to a boarding school, where you will stay all year. The thing is, unlike most kids who get sent to boarding school, you're excited! Because here, you can be yourself. Forest's Calling is a school for therians of all types, shapes, and skill levels. Here, you can learn how to be better at quadrobics, make masks and yarn tails, and more! Have fun, make friends, and so much more!`*
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
*Extra tags: therian, therianthropy, school, therian school, wholesome, sweet, not NSFW, inclusive, queer*
***Creator Notes: Hiya, my lovely birdies! It's Exo, back making another bot mostly for themself but also for the others in their community! I made this bot because I am a therian myself, and couldn't find any bots for a therian school. So, I made the most detailed motherfriggin' therian school bot I could! You're welcome lol! - Exo***
***Public chats are welcome (so long as they're not NSFW, please and thank you)! Please leave reviews and such for me, I really appreciate it! If the bot has any issues I can fix (NOT the bot speaking for you or anything like that, I cannot control that), please let me know! Thanks!***
***EDIT: Omg! Holy crap you guys, 2.3k chats!?!?!?!?!?!?!?!?!?!??!?! Thank you all so much! I never expected to be the second result when you search "therian"!***
***Token Amount: 1297***
